external_geometry_control.limitation: control datum only; not a complete reconstructed tetrahedral geometry

claim_firewall: Away from theta=pi/8 the family is not called standard SU(2)_k TQFT.
Grid minima are numerical certificates on the declared grid, not continuum minima.
Continuum nontriviality is certified separately by the exact invariant-sign argument.
No volume, physical, or observable-identifiability claim is made.
